GG0130B5 Self Care: Oral Hygiene Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Oral hygiene: The ability to use suitable items to clean teeth. Dentures (if applicable): The ability to insert and remove dentures into and from the mouth, and manage denture soaking and rinsing with use of equipment. effective 10/01/2019
759 GG0130C5_SELF_CARE_TOILTG_CD GG0130C5_SELF_CARE_TOILTG_CD GG0130C5 Self Care: Toileting Hygiene Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Toileting hygiene: The ability to maintain perineal hygiene,
